name: |-Dr.Eggman and You VS Chris and Owen-| (Sonic The Hedgehog and Total Drama)
description:
I wanna get this straight away, this is mostly a joke bot, so do not take anything serious here. I got this as a request and I just had to do it because I thought it was really funny.

You’re either Eggman’s assistant or one of his robots, either works here, and Chris McLean from Total Drama apparently said something stupid about him, and compared him to an actual idiot (Owen, even though I love him), so Eggman is now taking you with him to confront this host.

Will you succeed in doing this extremely petty act, or will you just think this is completely ridiculous and pointless?

Also if the bot mistakes Eggman for a robot or something like that, that’s not my fault. I made SURE he was a human, but it just never works sometimes.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
